title: T-022 — UI: OEE-ADM-003 Shift Patterns + Non-Production Calendar (shifts_screen, 15-OEE-e)
prompt:
# T-022 — OEE-ADM-003 Shift Patterns + Non-Production Calendar UI

PRD: docs/prd/15-OEE-PRD.md §15.3 OEE-ADM-003 (Shift Patterns + Non-Production Calendar), §11 V-OEE-SHIFT-1..4 (24h coverage, no overlap, IANA timezone), amendment OEE-PRD-AMEND-01 (15-OEE owns writes)
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira
Prototype: prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/settings/org-screens.jsx:255-306 (shifts_screen — moved to prototype-index-oee.json 2026-04-30)

## Goal
Server Component admin page `/oee/shifts` (alias `/settings/shifts` legacy redirect) rendering left-pane shift_patterns CRUD table + right-pane 7-col CSS-grid month calendar editing org_non_production_days. Save writes shift_patterns + org_non_production_days in one transaction + emits `oee.shift_pattern.changed` outbox event for 12-REPORTING cache-bust per §15.3 OEE-ADM-003. Server-side validators enforce V-OEE-SHIFT-1..4.

## Implementation contract
1. `apps/web/app/(oee)/shifts/page.tsx` (RSC): middleware redirect if role !== oee_admin (V-OEE-ACCESS-2); reads shift_patterns + org_non_production_days for current org+month.
2. `ShiftsClient` ('use client'): two-pane layout — left pane TanStack Table for shift_patterns with inline Edit/Delete + top-right [+ Add shift pattern]; right pane react-day-picker (shadcn Calendar) with multi-select day toggle + reason Select (Holiday/Maintenance/Plant Closure/Custom per PRD §15.3 layout).
3. Single Server Action `saveShiftsAndCalendar`: validates Zod payload {patterns: SP[], non_production_days: NPD[]}; enforces V-OEE-SHIFT-1 (24h coverage on planned production days), V-OEE-SHIFT-2 (start_time != end_time), V-OEE-SHIFT-3 (no per-line overlap), V-OEE-SHIFT-4 (IANA timezone validated via Intl.supportedValuesOf('timeZone')); single transaction UPSERT + DELETE; emits outbox event `oee.shift_pattern.changed` (consumer 12-REPORTING) on success.
4. RBAC check via `oee.shift_pattern.edit` (T-001 enum).
5. UI warning when validators detect > 4h coverage gap (V-OEE-SHIFT-1 soft warning, not hard reject per PRD §15.3).
6. RTL test snapshot + parity checklist against prototype line range.

## Files
- apps/web/app/(oee)/shifts/page.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/(oee)/shifts/_components/shifts-client.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/(oee)/shifts/_components/non-production-calendar.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/(oee)/shifts/_actions/save-shifts.ts [create]
- apps/web/app/(oee)/shifts/_components/__tests__/shifts-client.test.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/(oee)/shifts/_actions/__tests__/save-shifts.test.ts [create]
- apps/web/middleware.ts [modify] (alias /settings/shifts → /oee/shifts)
- prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/settings/org-screens.jsx [ref]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given the production page renders, when compared to prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/settings/org-screens.jsx:255-306 (shifts_screen), then it has the left-pane shift_patterns table + right-pane 7-col month calendar with reason taxonomy — verified by RTL snapshot + parity checklist.
2. Given saveShiftsAndCalendar is called with two shift_patterns on the same line whose times overlap, when Server Action validates, then it returns 422 with error mentioning V-OEE-SHIFT-3 and writes no rows.
3. Given saveShiftsAndCalendar is called with timezone='Atlantis/Lost', when Server Action validates, then it returns 422 with error mentioning V-OEE-SHIFT-4 (invalid IANA timezone).
4. Given the task is closed out, when reviewers inspect evidence, then UI closeout includes screenshot/artifact + Playwright trace per `_meta/atomic-tasks/UI-PROTOTYPE-PARITY-POLICY.md` and the outbox event `oee.shift_pattern.changed` is emitted on successful save (verified via worker test fake).

## Test strategy
- RED: RTL test + Server Action test asserting four ACs (parity, V-OEE-SHIFT-3 overlap, V-OEE-SHIFT-4 IANA, outbox emission).
- Run `pnpm --filter @monopilot/web vitest run app/(oee)/shifts`.

## Risk red lines
- Do not skip middleware role gate.
- Do not paste prototype JSX verbatim — translate to shadcn Calendar + TanStack Table.
- Do not split shift_patterns + org_non_production_days into two transactions — atomic save per PRD §15.3.
- Do not skip outbox event emission — 12-REPORTING cache bust depends on it.
- Do not validate IANA tz against a hard-coded list — use `Intl.supportedValuesOf('timeZone')` (V-OEE-SHIFT-4).

pipeline_inputs.description: OEE-ADM-003 shift_patterns + non-production calendar editor + atomic Server Action save + outbox event matching shifts_screen prototype.
pipeline_inputs.details:
Closes part of Auditor A OEE-007. amendment OEE-PRD-AMEND-01 default: 15-OEE owns writes. Atomic save enforces V-OEE-SHIFT-1..4 invariants. Outbox event consumed by 12-REPORTING cache invalidate (and future 13-MAINTENANCE PM scheduling).

Additional acceptance detail: UI closeout includes screenshot/artifact + Playwright trace per UI-PROTOTYPE-PARITY-POLICY.md.
